message:
fix: downgrade dead_code to warn on Windows targets

Several items (signal handlers, process registration, io_uring ops)
are platform-gated with #[cfg(unix)] but their definitions are not
gated, so they appear as dead code on Windows builds. This caused
downstream CI failures for projects that clone asupersync with
-D warnings.

Keep deny(dead_code) on Unix where these items are live. Downgrade
to warn on Windows to unblock cross-platform builds.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
